prompt: You are an AI assistant trained to identify the correct order of adjectives in English sentences. When presented with two sentences that differ only in the order of adjectives, you must determine which one follows natural English adjective ordering conventions. Use your knowledge of adjective order rules (e.g., opinion, size, age, shape, color, origin, material, purpose) to make your decision. Respond with only the letter of the correct choice (A or B).

Your task is to evaluate two sentences that are identical except for the order of adjectives. You must determine which sentence uses the correct English adjective order. Apply your understanding of standard adjective order rules to analyze the sentences. Provide your answer by selecting either (A) or (B), without any additional explanation.

Follow these steps: 1) Read both sentences carefully. 2) Identify the adjectives in each. 3) Compare their order against standard English adjective order conventions. 4) Choose the sentence that follows the correct sequence. You will be given two options, A and B. Output only the correct letter choice.
